description: CoAIleague Platform Component Registry - Central index for AI-driven code discovery and editing

tiers.tier0: Critical infrastructure - requires human approval for changes
tiers.tier1: Core business logic - AI can propose changes with LLM-as-Judge review
tiers.tier2: Feature components - AI can edit with standard guardrails
tiers.tier3: Utility/helper code - AI can freely modify

CORE-APP-001.name: Application Shell
CORE-APP-001.intent: Main application entry point with routing, providers, and layout

CORE-SIDEBAR-001.name: Application Sidebar
CORE-SIDEBAR-001.intent: Main navigation sidebar with role-based menu items

CORE-NAV-CONFIG-001.name: Navigation Configuration
CORE-NAV-CONFIG-001.intent: Centralized navigation routes and menu structure

CORE-THEME-001.name: Theme System
CORE-THEME-001.intent: Dark/light mode theming with CSS variables

CORE-AUTH-001.name: Authentication System
CORE-AUTH-001.intent: User authentication, session management, and RBAC

CORE-RBAC-001.name: Role-Based Access Control
CORE-RBAC-001.intent: Platform and workspace role management with 8 platform and 7 workspace levels

AI-BRAIN-001.name: AI Brain Master Orchestrator
AI-BRAIN-001.intent: Central hub coordinating 269+ actions across 18 categories

AI-SUBAGENT-001.name: Subagent Supervisor
AI-SUBAGENT-001.intent: Manages 23 specialized domain subagents with diagnostic workflow and RBAC

AI-TRINITY-001.name: Trinity AI Mascot
AI-TRINITY-001.intent: Interactive AI mascot providing global insights and assistance

UNS-001.name: Universal Notification System
UNS-001.intent: Real-time notifications with WebSocket, priority levels, and cross-tab sync

CORE-WEBSOCKET-001.name: WebSocket Infrastructure
CORE-WEBSOCKET-001.intent: Real-time communication backbone for notifications, chat, and live updates

SCHED-001.name: Universal Schedule System
SCHED-001.intent: Drag-and-drop scheduling with AI recommendations and compliance

PAY-001.name: Payroll System
PAY-001.intent: Payroll processing with Stripe integration and compliance

EMAIL-001.name: Email System (Resend)
EMAIL-001.intent: Transactional email with templates and per-email billing

DB-001.name: Database Schema
DB-001.intent: PostgreSQL schema with 150+ indexed tables via Drizzle ORM

STORAGE-001.name: Object Storage (GCS)
STORAGE-001.intent: File storage for documents, images, and assets

DASH-001.name: Dashboard
DASH-001.intent: Main user dashboard with widgets and quick actions

SEASONAL-001.name: Seasonal Theme System
SEASONAL-001.intent: AI-powered holiday theming with 11 seasonal variations

secretsMap.description: Read-only reference for AI agents to understand credential usage
secretsMap.rotationPolicy: Secrets should be rotated quarterly. Use HMAC-signed elevation tokens for AI/automation bypass.

tier0.description: Critical infrastructure - AI proposes changes via PR, human must approve

tier1.description: Core business logic - AI can edit with LLM-as-Judge validation

tier2.description: Feature components - AI can edit with credit budget and RBAC checks

tier3.description: Utility code - AI can freely modify
